message:
fix(mvcc): re-export TxnAbortReason as public for downstream crates

Change TxnAbortReason from a private import to a pub use re-export
so that ffs-core and other downstream crates can reference it as
ffs_mvcc::TxnAbortReason without reaching into internal modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
